ocr.text: The table presents data on various proteins, detailing their accession numbers, protein names, lysine-acetylated peptides, and
the corresponding residues in the protein. For accession P62805, the protein name is Histone H4, with lysine-acetylated peptide
GK*GGK*GLGK*GGAK*R, and it spans residues 5–18; another peptide for the same protein is GGK*GLGK*GGAK*R,
covering residues 7–18, and GLGK*GGAK*R, spanning residues 10–18. Accession Q5TEC6 corresponds to Histone H3,
featuring the lysine-acetylated peptides K*STGGK*APR, covering residues 10–18, and K*QLATK*AAR, spanning residues
19–27. Accession Q15149 identifies Plectin, with the peptide IEQEK*AKLEQLFQDEVAK, which spans residues 2646–2663.
The accession P08670 refers to Vimentin, which has the lysine-acetylated peptide ASLARLDLERK*VESLQEEIAFLK,
covering residues 213–235.

P62805  Histone H4  GK*GGK*GLGK*GGAK*R  5–18
GGK*GLGK*GGAK*R  7–18
GLGK*GGAK*R  10–18
Q5TEC6  Histone H3  K*STGGK*APR  10–18
K*QLATK*AAR  19–27
Q15149  Plectin  IEQEK*AKLEQLFQDEVAK  2646–2663
P08670  Vimentin  ASLARLDLERK*VESLQEEIAFLK  213–235
Q9UHB6  LIM domain and actin-binding protein 1  STPAEDDSRDSQVK*  336–349
P15880  40S ribosomal protein S2  TK*SPYQEFTDHLVK  262–275
P62158  Calmodulin  HVMTNLGEK*LTDEEVDEMIR  108–127
Q86V81  THO complex subunit 4  ADK*MDMSLDDIIK  2–14
Accession Q9UHB6 denotes LIM domain and actin-binding protein 1, with the peptide STPAEDDSRDSQVK*, spanning
residues 336–349. For accession P15880, the protein name is 40S ribosomal protein S2, featuring TK*SPYQEFTDHLVK,
covering residues 262–275. Accession P62158 corresponds to Calmodulin, with the peptide HVMTNLGEK*LTDEEVDEMIR,
spanning residues 108–127. Lastly, accession Q86V81 identifies THO complex subunit 4, with the peptide
ADK*MDMSLDDIIK, which covers residues 2–14.
